personal.preferred_title: Data Engineer | Growth Analytics, Experimentation Support, Product Telemetry

summary: Data Engineer specializing in growth analytics, experimentation support, and product telemetry pipelines. Experienced in Python/SQL pipeline development, user behavior and operational data modeling, and dashboarding that supports faster business and product decisions. Proven track record translating large-scale telemetry into reliable analytics datasets, KPI reporting, and actionable insights.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Engineered telemetry ingestion and analytics pipelines (Python/Pandas) for data from 6,000+ endpoints (BMC TrueSight/TSCO), improving decision-ready reporting and operational readiness.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle analytics platform with S3, AWS Glue ETL, and Redshift, supporting scalable reporting and metric-driven planning workflows.
Developed interactive Streamlit/matplotlib/seaborn/plotly dashboards for usage trends, KPI tracking, and real-time insights, enabling faster stakeholder decisions.
Integrated disparate monitoring feeds (TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics) into unified analytics reporting and metric views, reducing mean time to repair (MTTR).
Designed ML forecasting models (Prophet, scikit-learn) achieving 90%+ accuracy in predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for critical hospitality systems, implementing alerts and dashboards for proactive issue detection and trend visibility.
Led 'FAST' project, mining real-user performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to provide optimization recommendations and behavior-informed improvements.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 with zero regression, ensuring robust monitoring during cloud migration planning to AWS.
Implemented End-User Monitoring (EUM) and transaction tracing across web and mobile, enhancing incident diagnosis capabilities.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME, managing 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents and designing custom dashboards and alerts for enterprise monitoring.
Led CA APM upgrades (9.1 → 10.1) with zero downtime, coordinating with IT teams to ensure operational continuity.
Built Perl/Ksh scripts for automated performance reporting, streamlining monitoring processes and reducing manual effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Cloud & Data: AWS (Glue, Athena, S3, Redshift), PySpark, Hive/Hadoop, Data Warehousing, Data Modeling (fact/dim), Metrics Layer Design
skills.Tools & Infra: Airflow, Dynatrace (AppMon + Synthetics), BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM/Introscope, Splunk (familiar), Docker, Git, Streamlit
skills.Legacy: Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, Oracle RAC, WebLogic/WebSphere, VB6/VC++

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Developed an AI-driven forecasting engine with Python and PySpark, reducing forecasting cycles by 90% and enabling faster data-driven planning decisions through recurring KPI outputs.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock, optimizing ETL processes for analytics-ready data access, reporting workflows, and faster decision support.
